MUST: Student registration view MUST be geo-restricted to Milagro city only (RF-001)
Registration views MUST use CBV with LoginRequiredMixin and UserPassesTestMixin (RNF-004)
Registration views MUST use appropriate form classes — MUST NOT instantiate forms inline (RNF-004)
Minor registration view MUST notify admin via Django admin after form submission (RF-003)
MUST_NOT: Registration views MUST NOT contain form validation logic (RNF-004)
Registration views MUST NOT contain profile creation logic — MUST delegate to services.py (RNF-004)

MUST: Login views MUST redirect superusers and staff to /admin/ (RF-002)
Login views MUST redirect regular users based on user_type (RF-002)
Login views MUST use CBV pattern (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: Login views MUST NOT reveal whether email exists in system in error messages (RNF-002)

MUST: TutorDashboardView MUST use LoginRequiredMixin + UserPassesTestMixin with test_func: user_type=='tutor' (RNF-002)
ClientDashboardView MUST use LoginRequiredMixin + UserPassesTestMixin with test_func: user_type=='client' (RNF-002)
Dashboard views MUST call ClassSessionManager methods — MUST NOT build querysets inline (RNF-004)
Dashboard views MUST use CBV with get_context_data() for context (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: Dashboard views MUST NOT contain query filtering or ordering logic (RNF-004)
Tutors MUST NOT access client dashboard and vice versa (RF-002)

MUST: Profile edit views MUST use CBV with UserPassesTestMixin for role validation (RNF-002)
Profile edit views MUST delegate save logic to accounts.services (RNF-004)
Profile edit views MUST use appropriate form classes (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: Profile edit views MUST NOT contain profile update logic inline (RNF-004)
